descriptions: Added Config.Trackbuilder.AdminOnly — when true, only admins may create, edit, or delete tracks.
Added framework permission hook CanStartRace(source) — controls who can start a race (returns true by default).
Added framework permission hook CanCreateTrack(source) — defaults to checking admin/god QBCore permissions and Ace command permission.
Both new permission functions live inside the frameworks/ folder, allowing full customization (job-based access, Discord roles, etc.) without touching core resource code.
